title: Green Thumb Industries Announces $50 Million Share Repurchase Program
text: Green Thumb Industries Inc. unveiled an authorization for a $50 million share buyback on September 16, 2024. The program permits repurchasing up to 10,573,860 subordinate voting shares over the next 12 months, commencing September 23, 2024 and expiring September 22, 2025. The cannabis retailer and manufacturer completed its previous repurchase initiative by acquiring 6.5 million shares for $73.3 million before its September 10 expiration. CEO Ben Kovler stated that the company continues to believe in the value-creating nature of share buybacks done at attractive prices, while emphasizing management's willingness to pursue strategic acquisitions and capital investments if better opportunities emerge. Green Thumb faces no obligation to complete any purchases under this authorization. The company will not incur debt to finance the repurchase and can suspend or terminate buying at any time. Share acquisitions will occur through Canadian Securities Exchange, OTCQX, or alternative trading systems, with all repurchased shares cancelled upon return to treasury.
